headline: World Cup вҡҪрҹ”Ҙ makes NFL рҹҸҲрҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’« Car Guy a SOCCER SIMP рҹҘ…рҹ’ҳ
text: Indiana рҹҡ—рҹ’Ё car salesman Jamie Druley, 51, was straight-up NFL рҹҸҲрҹӨӘ obsessed until the Tartan Army рҹҚәрҹҸҙу Ғ§у Ғўу Ғіу ҒЈу Ғҙу Ғҝ rolled into Boston and turned his world UPSIDE DOWN в¬ҶпёҸв¬ҮпёҸ! He started watching the World Cup вҡҪрҹҢҚ on home soil and now heвҖҷs SCREAMING рҹ“Јрҹҳұ at the TV like itвҖҷs the Super Bowl every night! Wife texting from the bedroom вҖңQUIET DOWN рҹ“өрҹ’ӨвҖқ while he bets his BOSS рҹ’јрҹӨ‘ on the final and theyвҖҷre both YELLING рҹҳӮрҹ”Ҙ during England vs Argentina! DruleyвҖҷs even eyeing season tickets for Fort Wayne FC рҹҸҹпёҸрҹҺҹпёҸ after their new 9,200-seat stadium dropped! Fox says 30 MILLION рҹ“әрҹҡҖ watched USA vs Belgium вҖ“ biggest English soccer broadcast in US HISTORY рҹ“ңрҹҸҶ! Average 5.1M viewers across 72 matches, a 92% JUMP рҹҗёрҹ“Ҳ from 2022! Pennsylvania mom Courtney Silbaugh, 33, went from вҖңnot a sports spectator at allвҖқ рҹҷ…вҖҚвҷҖпёҸ to вҖңOBSESSEDвҖқ рҹҳҚвҡҪ after watching every game except six! She tried American football рҹҸҲ but it flopped, baseball was a blur рҹ‘ҖвқҢ but soccer clicked! Banker grandma Heather Earhart, 54, in Indiana caught the England bug рҹҮ¬рҹҮ§рҹҺ¶ with Hey Jude and Oasis Wonderwall blasting while she cleans the kitchen рҹ§№рҹҺӨ! SheвҖҷs now YouTubing вҖңhow to curve the ballвҖқ tutorials вҡҪрҹ“ҡ and plans to hit the Indy soccer bar рҹҚәрҹҘ…! Connecticut coach Nate Roberts, 40, is drowning in 10-20 emails a week рҹ“§рҹҳө plus double on socials from parents wanting kids in pickup вҖңbeer leaguesвҖқ рҹҚ»вҡҪ for 18+! EveryoneвҖҷs vibing on the global camaraderie рҹҢҚрҹӨқ and positivity at the World Cup! Druley says вҖңmaybe what the world needs right nowвҖқ but heвҖҷs got ONE LIMIT рҹҡ« вҖ“ heвҖҷll NEVER call it football, itвҖҷs SOCCER 4EVER рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹҳӮ!
